TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Kanahcian = Gaga mniq Taytung Haytwansyang ka alang Kanahcian. 39 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 145 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 98% niqan 142 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 2% niqan 3 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun89%, Amis1%, Paiwan1%, Puyuma1%, Truku1%, ni rahuq na o5%.
S.PHON: = kanaħʦian = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ħajtwansjaŋ ka alaŋ kanaħʦian. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan * ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, pujuma*%, tɾuku*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Kanahcian = Gaga mniq Taytung Haytwansyang ka alang Kanahcian. 39 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 145 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 98% niqan 142 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 2% niqan 3 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun89%, Amis1%, Paiwan1%, Puyuma1%, Truku1%, ni rahuq na o5%.
S.PHON: = kanaħʦian = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ħajtwansjaŋ ka alaŋ kanaħʦian. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan * ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, pujuma*%, tɾuku*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
